hooks.command: $j = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = if ($j.tool_input.file_path) { $j.tool_input.file_path } else { $j.tool_response.filePath }; if ($f) { git -C 'C:\Users\anaki\Dev\SW5E_CharacterSheet' add $f }

Set-Location 'C:\Users\anaki\Dev\SW5E_CharacterSheet'; git add -A; if (git status --porcelain) { $files = @(git diff --cached --name-only); $summary = ($files -join ', '); if ($summary.Length -gt 60) { $summary = $summary.Substring(0,57)+'...' }; $stat = (git diff --cached --stat --no-color | Select-Object -Last 1).Trim(); git commit -m "auto: $stat [$summary]"; git push origin HEAD --quiet }
